covid_period.note: COVID period (2020-2021) was intentionally excluded from verified_transitions.parquet

sample_size.blocker_detail: COVID period data not in current extract. Would require new IPUMS download and reprocessing.

dingel_neiman.format: CSV with SOC codes and teleworkable score (0-1)

essential_worker.source: LMI Institute / C2ER - CISA Critical Infrastructure Workers (SOC codes)
essential_worker.crosswalk_method: SOC code direct match; binary classification (essential/not)
essential_worker.note: Coverage lower than Dingel-Neiman; some Census codes have no mapped essential SOCs

transition_quality.note: COVID data not available. Pre-COVID baseline: 4.10% bounce-back within ~12 months (CPS rotation compatible). COVID comparison blocked.
transition_quality.cps_design_limitation: CPS rotation (4-in, 8-out, 4-in) means consecutive observations ~12 months apart, not 3-4 months

recommendation: COVID period data is not available in current extract. Three options: (1) Re-download CPS 2020-2021 from IPUMS and reprocess - estimated 1-2 days additional work; (2) Use post-COVID (2022-2024) as alternative treatment period (remote work persistence); (3) Defer COVID test entirely. Dingel-Neiman and essential worker data ARE available if sample obtained.
